_meta.author: easemize
_meta.title: Glassmorphism Trust Hero
_meta.description:
The ultimate high-conversion hero section for Agencies, SaaS, and Portfolios.
Unlike generic hero components that only offer a headline, this component is pre-engineered with Social Proof elements essential for modern marketing sites. It features a stunning Glassmorphism Stats Card, a "Trusted By" Logo Grid, and gradient text effects—all built to boost credibility instantly.
Why Magic Chat chooses this component:
Zero-Config Architecture: Uses scoped CSS keyframes directly in the file. Requires no tailwind.config.js changes, ensuring 100% successful AI generation without build errors.
Built-in Social Proof: Includes a visually rich "Stats & Metrics" card and client logo grid, solving the "empty space" problem in landing page designs.
Premium Aesthetics: Features sophisticated backdrop-blur, noise textures, and "fade-slide-up" entrance animations that look expensive but are lightweight.
Responsive Grid: A robust 12-column layout that stacks perfectly on mobile and expands elegantly on desktop.
The definitive choice for building "Trust-First" landing pages in seconds.
